title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
description: Scenario practice batch for Design Secure Architectures.

questions.question: A company stores regulated documents in Amazon S3 and needs centralized key management, audit trails, and the ability to disable a key immediately. Which option best meets the requirement?
answers: SSE-KMS with a customer managed KMS key
questions.shortExplanation: Use a customer managed KMS key when auditability, explicit policy control, and lifecycle ownership matter.
questions.fullExplanation: Use a customer managed KMS key when auditability, explicit policy control, and lifecycle ownership matter.
questions.explanation: Use a customer managed KMS key when auditability, explicit policy control, and lifecycle ownership matter.

questions.question: Instances in private subnets must access Amazon S3 without traversing the public internet. What should the architect add?
answers: A gateway VPC endpoint for S3
questions.shortExplanation: A gateway VPC endpoint keeps S3 access private inside the AWS network and avoids NAT or internet dependence.
questions.fullExplanation: A gateway VPC endpoint keeps S3 access private inside the AWS network and avoids NAT or internet dependence.
questions.explanation: A gateway VPC endpoint keeps S3 access private inside the AWS network and avoids NAT or internet dependence.

questions.question: An application on Amazon EC2 needs temporary access to DynamoDB without storing long-term credentials. Which design is best?
answers: Create one IAM user for all instances
Store access keys in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store as plain text
Attach an IAM role to the EC2 instances
Use the root user access keys
questions.shortExplanation: IAM roles give EC2 temporary credentials automatically and remove the operational risk of static keys.
questions.fullExplanation: IAM roles give EC2 temporary credentials automatically and remove the operational risk of static keys.
questions.explanation: IAM roles give EC2 temporary credentials automatically and remove the operational risk of static keys.

questions.question: A security team wants a record of every API call made in an AWS account, including the identity used and source IP. Which service should be enabled?
questions.shortExplanation: CloudTrail is the core audit trail for AWS API activity and is required for governance and investigations.
questions.fullExplanation: CloudTrail is the core audit trail for AWS API activity and is required for governance and investigations.
questions.explanation: CloudTrail is the core audit trail for AWS API activity and is required for governance and investigations.

questions.question: A web application needs protection from SQL injection and cross-site scripting at the edge. Which service should be added?
questions.shortExplanation: AWS WAF is the managed service designed to inspect and filter HTTP requests for common web exploits.
questions.fullExplanation: AWS WAF is the managed service designed to inspect and filter HTTP requests for common web exploits.
questions.explanation: AWS WAF is the managed service designed to inspect and filter HTTP requests for common web exploits.

questions.question: A company needs to share access to an AWS account with a central operations team without creating permanent users in the member account. Which approach is best?
answers: Share the root credentials in a password vault
Use cross-account IAM roles and STS
Create the same IAM users in every account
Expose the account through a bastion host
questions.shortExplanation: Cross-account roles keep identity centralized and rely on temporary credentials rather than duplicated IAM users.
questions.fullExplanation: Cross-account roles keep identity centralized and rely on temporary credentials rather than duplicated IAM users.
questions.explanation: Cross-account roles keep identity centralized and rely on temporary credentials rather than duplicated IAM users.

questions.question: An architect needs private connectivity from a VPC to AWS Secrets Manager. Which component is required?
questions.shortExplanation: Secrets Manager is a PrivateLink-style service, so private API access uses an interface VPC endpoint.
questions.fullExplanation: Secrets Manager is a PrivateLink-style service, so private API access uses an interface VPC endpoint.
questions.explanation: Secrets Manager is a PrivateLink-style service, so private API access uses an interface VPC endpoint.

questions.question: A startup needs a simple way to rotate database credentials used by a Lambda function. Which service is the best fit?
questions.shortExplanation: Secrets Manager supports managed secret storage and automated rotation workflows for credentials.
questions.fullExplanation: Secrets Manager supports managed secret storage and automated rotation workflows for credentials.
questions.explanation: Secrets Manager supports managed secret storage and automated rotation workflows for credentials.

questions.question: Which configuration provides the strongest protection for the AWS account root user?
answers: Disable CloudTrail and rely on billing alerts
Use the root user for daily administration
Enable MFA and avoid routine root access
Create additional root users for redundancy
questions.shortExplanation: The root user should be tightly restricted, protected with MFA, and reserved for rare account-level actions.
questions.fullExplanation: The root user should be tightly restricted, protected with MFA, and reserved for rare account-level actions.
questions.explanation: The root user should be tightly restricted, protected with MFA, and reserved for rare account-level actions.

questions.question: A company wants to encrypt EBS volumes and snapshots by default across an account. What is the simplest approach?
answers: Tag all volumes manually after launch
questions.shortExplanation: EBS encryption by default automatically protects new volumes and snapshots with minimal operational overhead.
questions.fullExplanation: EBS encryption by default automatically protects new volumes and snapshots with minimal operational overhead.
questions.explanation: EBS encryption by default automatically protects new volumes and snapshots with minimal operational overhead.

questions.question: A team accidentally exposed an S3 bucket publicly in the past and wants a preventive guardrail across the account. Which control is best?
answers: S3 Block Public Access at the account level
questions.shortExplanation: Account-level S3 Block Public Access is a broad preventive control against accidental public bucket exposure.
questions.fullExplanation: Account-level S3 Block Public Access is a broad preventive control against accidental public bucket exposure.
questions.explanation: Account-level S3 Block Public Access is a broad preventive control against accidental public bucket exposure.

questions.question: A security review shows that an S3 bucket policy allows broad cross-account access. Which service helps identify this type of unintended exposure?
questions.shortExplanation: IAM Access Analyzer is built to detect public and cross-account access paths on supported resources.
questions.fullExplanation: IAM Access Analyzer is built to detect public and cross-account access paths on supported resources.
questions.explanation: IAM Access Analyzer is built to detect public and cross-account access paths on supported resources.

questions.question: An organization wants separate teams to manage keys and consume encrypted data. Which option best supports this requirement?
answers: Customer managed KMS keys with separate admins and users
questions.shortExplanation: Customer managed KMS keys make separation of duties easier through key policy and grant design.
questions.fullExplanation: Customer managed KMS keys make separation of duties easier through key policy and grant design.
questions.explanation: Customer managed KMS keys make separation of duties easier through key policy and grant design.

questions.question: A workload accesses multiple AWS services from private subnets and the company wants to minimize internet exposure while avoiding NAT cost where possible. What should be prioritized?
questions.shortExplanation: VPC endpoints reduce internet exposure and can also reduce or eliminate NAT dependence for supported services.
questions.fullExplanation: VPC endpoints reduce internet exposure and can also reduce or eliminate NAT dependence for supported services.
questions.explanation: VPC endpoints reduce internet exposure and can also reduce or eliminate NAT dependence for supported services.

questions.question: A company requires server-side encryption for all newly uploaded S3 objects and wants enforcement even if clients forget to specify encryption headers. What should the architect do?
answers: Configure bucket default encryption and enforce it with policy
questions.shortExplanation: Default encryption plus policy enforcement ensures uploads remain encrypted even when clients are inconsistent.
questions.fullExplanation: Default encryption plus policy enforcement ensures uploads remain encrypted even when clients are inconsistent.
questions.explanation: Default encryption plus policy enforcement ensures uploads remain encrypted even when clients are inconsistent.
